title: centella tridentata
intro: Centella tridentata, also known as Marsh Pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve cognitive function, among other benefits. Centella tridentata can be prepared as an herbal supplement or used in traditional medicine, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
